name: Lisas Peach and Raspberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8 quart saucepan, stir together the peaches, raspberries, and pectin.
2. Over high heat, bring the mixture to a boil while stirring constantly.
3. Quickly add the sugar and bring back up to a full rolling boil. Boil hard for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and skim foam if necessary.
5. Immediately fill hot sterilized half-pint jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
6. Wipe jar tops and threads clean.
7. Place hot lids on hot jars and apply screw bands.
8. Process in boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
